title: Luffy Pushes Forward
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Smoker, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5. The central beat is luffy pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Smoker, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're falling down one after another!!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Smoker- SaaN!! It's too danger- OUS!!

summary: Luffy Pushes Forward. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
